evals.prompt: Set up symphony-go for my repo at github.com/acme/backend so it picks up Linear issues from my project and runs codex agents on them
evals.expected_output: Creates a WORKFLOW.md with correct tracker config, hooks for git clone, codex settings, and instructions to export LINEAR_API_KEY and run symphony

evals.prompt: My symphony agent keeps failing with 'Unable to create .git/index.lock: Operation not permitted'. How do I fix this?
evals.expected_output: Identifies the sandbox mode as the cause and recommends setting thread_sandbox to danger-full-access in the codex config section of WORKFLOW.md

evals.prompt: Symphony is running but not picking up any issues from Linear. The dashboard shows no running agents. What should I check?
evals.expected_output: Walks through checklist: verify project_slug, active_states match Linear workflow names, LINEAR_API_KEY is valid, concurrency limits, and suggests testing the API key with curl
